commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gated OpenTelemetry LLM prompt, output, system-instruction, and tool-definition content attributes for Codex and Pi model-call diagnostics, with docs, config schema updates, tests, and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +520, Tests +435, Docs +5. Total +960 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR. Source inspection shows current main lacks the requested GenAI/Phoenix content attributes, and the PR body supplies real Phoenix trace proof for the new behavior.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can refresh the two generated baseline hashes; maintainer judgment is still needed for the opt-in sensitive content/API surface.

target.title: Add OpenTelemetry LLM content spans
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an explicit diagnostic LLM content-capture policy for model-call diagnostics.
- Attach Codex and Pi model-call prompt history, output messages, system prompt, and tool definitions when OTEL content capture is enabled.
- Export Phoenix/OpenTelemetry-readable LLM attributes, including `gen_ai.input.messages`, `gen_ai.output.messages`, `gen_ai.system_instructions`, `gen_ai.tool.definitions`, `input.value`, and `output.value`.
- Add focused tests and a changelog entry.

## Verification

- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_SERIAL=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/diagnostic-llm-content.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts`
  - 5 test files passed
  - 302 tests passed

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: OpenTelemetry LLM spans now expose full prompt history, system instructions, model output, and tool definitions when `diagnostics.otel.captureContent` is explicitly enabled.

Real environment tested: Local macOS OpenClaw gateway from this branch with Phoenix running at `http://127.0.0.1:6006` and the gateway at `http://127.0.0.1:18789`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Started the gateway with `OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=1 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:6006/v1/traces OTEL_SEMCONV_STABILITY_OPT_IN=gen_ai_latest_experimental node --import tsx src/entry.ts gateway --force`, then sent two turns through `node --import tsx src/entry.ts agent --agent main --session-key agent:main:otel-llm-trace-validation-20260524-2247 ...`.

Evidence after fix: Phoenix span `openclaw.model.call` / trace `d398c193c8145f82e0ae63f6620c1095` contained both validation markers, prior assistant history, the final assistant response, system instructions, and 17 tool definitions.

Observed result after fix: The second LLM span input was `user -> assistant -> user`, included `OPENCLAW_OTEL_BUNDLED_TURN_ONE`, `OPENCLAW_OTEL_BUNDLED_TURN_TWO`, and `bundled tracing one ok`, and output contained `bundled tracing two ok`.

What was not tested: No broad CI/Crabbox run and no live Pi provider run; the Pi emission path is covered by focused unit tests.
target.author: amknight

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
